title: Use of Machine Learning Techniques to Create a Credit Score Model for Airtime Loans
venue: Journal of risk and financial management
search_query: Use of Machine Learning Techniques to Create a Credit Score Model for Airtime Loans
notes: Airtime lending default rates are typically lower than those experienced by banks and microfinance institutions (MFIs) but are likely to grow as the service is offered more widely. In this paper, credit scoring techniques are reviewed, and that knowledge is built upon to create a...
